title: Cobblemon: Noble Mons
description: Adds various custom Fakemon to the Cobblemon world.
body:
This datapack is made for my server, PokeFactorySMP. If you are interested in joining, please head my discord server. This pack is needed in both the Resource and Datapack folders in order to work properly.



So far, this datapack adds only 2 Pokemon; The Bug/Dragon type Chivalarva and Wyrmonarch.
